aston_quest0010.title: When Will I Taste Okonomiyaki!?
aston_quest0010.detail: I just really want some okonomiyaki! This is my fifth time coming to Osaka, and every time my boss tells me I gotta head right back. I haven't been able to buy a single souvenir!

aston_quest0020.title: Desperate for Staminan Light
aston_quest0020.detail: Argh, my stomach is killing me! Situations like this call for a Staminan Light, but it hurts too much to go get one myself... Please, somebody save me before it's too late!

aston_quest0030.title: Hungry, Hungry Bento
aston_quest0030.detail: Damn, I'm so hungry I asked a total stranger to buy me a Luxury Yakiniku Bento. Maybe that was too much, but I'm gettin' delirious here! Seemed like he felt sorry for me though, so I bet he'll get me one...

aston_quest0040.title: Takoyaki on the Brain
aston_quest0040.detail: I just... want... takoyaki! No, I have to think of my kid. Gotta save every yen I can for when they're born. I'll just have to imagine it for now. So savory... That hint of crispiness... Mmm...

aston_quest0050.title: In Need of Absorption
aston_quest0050.detail: Just relax. Calm down. I've been in this situation plenty of times before, haven't I? No, no, whatever you do, don't think of flowing—Shit! Clench! Clench!!

aston_quest0060.title: Tissue, Wipes, Anything!
aston_quest0060.detail: I can feel it inside me! Time to put everything I have into not letting go! Hnngh!!

aston_quest0070.title: Kitty Kat, Come Home
aston_quest0070.detail: I really, really want that Kitty Kat stuffed animal! It looks just like the kitty I used to have as a pet... You gotta help me bring her home, mister!

aston_quest0080.title: A Quest for Ono Michio
aston_quest0080.detail: Ever heard of Onomichi's local mascot, Ono Michio? Doesn't matter if you're young or old, everyone loves Michio! He's even got his own figures. Say... you wouldn't happen to have one, would you?

aston_quest0090.title: Time's a Luxury
aston_quest0090.detail: How in the world am I gonna get my hands on a Luxury Timepiece? Rumor has it they're sold at some shady place called the Castle, but... Hey, could you get one for me? I'll make it worth yer while!

aston_quest0100.title: In Search of Star-Crossed Earrings
aston_quest0100.detail: I'm sick of everyone making fun of me for being lame and unfashionable. If only I had some trendy Star-Crossed Earrings, but I'm never going to have the money for those...

aston_quest0110.title: Itching for Ichiban Senbei
aston_quest0110.detail: When it comes to senbei, you could say I'm a bit of a connoisseur. Lately, I've been hearing all about this Ichiban Senbei from Yokohama, and its new go-getter president. I just have to try it!

aston_quest1010.title: My Best Ball
aston_quest1010.detail: Oh no, my favorite ball got stuck in a tree! But I've seen lots of TV, so I know that the world is full of heroes! One's gotta come to my rescue... Right?

aston_quest1020.title: Kickin' the Habit
aston_quest1020.detail: I really stepped in it this time. I kicked my right shoe onto the roof, and then tried to kick it down with the left one and it got stuck too! Ugh, my mom's gonna be so mad...

aston_quest1030.title: A Dental Dilemma
aston_quest1030.detail: I heard you gotta throw yer teeth on the roof when they fall out, but now I kinda miss mine. We got all these nice memories of eatin', bitin', and brushin'... Argh, why'd I ever throw it up there!

aston_quest1040.title: Not Just a Hat
aston_quest1040.detail: I come from a long line of wealthy farmers, dating back to the Edo period. That hat is a timeless heirloom I inherited from my late grandfather, so it would mean very much if I could get it back.

aston_quest1050.title: The Waterlogged Ring
aston_quest1050.detail: How dreadful, I dropped my wedding ring in the river. My wife and I just celebrated our 50th wedding anniversary too... I wouldn't ask if it wasn't terribly important. Could you retrieve it for me?

aston_quest1060.title: A Priceless Autograph
aston_quest1060.detail: Think you could get down a ball I got stuck in a telephone pole? It's signed by a good friend o' mine, a real pro ballplayer! Well, not exactly pro but... It's still real valuable to me.

aston_quest1070.title: You Saw Nothing
aston_quest1070.detail: Please! Don't ask any questions, just listen! I need you to close your eyes and retrieve my... belonging. After that, erase everything you've seen from your memory! I know this is strange, but it's the only way under—I mean, out of this!

aston_quest1080.title: Catch That Crawdad!
aston_quest1080.detail: I went with my family to Ijincho and saw a scruffy-haired man with a crawdad on his shoulder! I was like wow, so crawdads and people can be friends, huh, and decided I was gonna do it too! We're gonna be best buds but I kinda dropped him, so bye, I gotta catch that crawdad!

aston_quest2010.title: Those Damn Smartphones!
aston_quest2010.detail: My yakiniku bento's all I look forward to, and now it got ruined by some punk who was too busy lookin' at his phone! He ain't even sorry about it neither! Someone's gotta teach this whippersnapper some manners.

aston_quest2020.title: The Dad Hunter
aston_quest2020.detail: I've been working hard to make the world a better place, and yet it is I who gets targeted for extortion while criminals go free. What horrible irony! I'll happily give money to the person who saves me, as long as these thugs see justice!

aston_quest2030.title: Protectors of My Ego
aston_quest2030.detail: I can't shake this horrible sense of shame. I felt such fear. I might as well have thrown away my dignity! What kind of person crumbles so easily!? ...Actually, I could really use some help, ahhh!

aston_quest2040.title: Taking the Blame
aston_quest2040.detail: I'm a manager, which means it's my job to convey orders from above, no matter how ridiculous. I've tried to intervene when I can, but I wasn't able to protect everyone. All I can do for them now is be a punching bag. Heh... Really wish I had someone to protect me at times like this.

aston_quest2050.title: Hunting the Homeless
aston_quest2050.detail: Dammit, I'm not homeless! I'm an undercover reporter trying to investigate. Of course now's the time I run into a guy like this. Should I reveal I'm a journalist? Or maybe I should let myself get beat up for the sake of the article... Never mind, someone just please help!

aston_quest2060.title: Until Next Time!
aston_quest2060.detail: Why does this always happen to me!? I'm always running into delinquents! No amount of studying helps in situations like these... Ugh, when I'm prime minister, I'm sending all these thugs to jail! But uh, in the meantime, please don't punch me!

aston_quest2070.title: Crush the Collector
aston_quest2070.detail: Shit, the collector's back again! He lost big gamblin' so he's in a real mood too... Ah, this ain't lookin' too good, someone help!

aston_quest2080.title: I need... uh, help!
aston_quest2080.detail: Oh no... I bumped into this scary guy and... Guess I should have expected it but... Am I gonna get beat up!?

aston_quest2090.title: The Trendy Thug
aston_quest2090.detail: Of course this is what I get for wearing these lame clothes! I got them in a giveaway and didn't even really like them, but I figured it'd be a waste not to wear at least once! Please, just leave me alone!

aston_quest2100.title: Turning the Tables
aston_quest2100.detail: Is this girl in cahoots with these guys? I met her on a dating app, and she is the one who suggested we walk down this street... Damn, why does this stuff always happen to me?

aston_quest2110.title: A Negative Exposure
aston_quest2110.detail: Oh no, what did I do! I didn't realize this scary guy was in my picture! He seems really mad, what if he doesn't accept my apology!?

aston_quest2120.title: A Yakuza Never Forgets
aston_quest2120.detail: I mean, yeah, I might've bumped into a guy who looked like this on a crowded train, but... I never thought he'd follow me this far! Are all yakuza this persistent!?

aston_quest2130.title: I'll Die Before I Let You In!
aston_quest2130.detail: No way I'm lettin' you in the store! I'll fight ya if I have to! No ifs, ands, or buts. I make the rules here! Ya better deal with it or put up yer fists!

aston_quest2140.title: Turn Out Your Pockets
aston_quest2140.detail: Got anything good on ya? I'm gonna need to check yer pockets before I let ya into this pawn shop.

aston_quest2150.title: A Stubborn Customer
aston_quest2150.detail: There's a customer here who refuses to come inside the restaurant! It seems like he's misunderstanding something, but he won't listen to any of us. Maybe you'll have better luck?

aston_quest2160.title: Chase Off the Nuisances
aston_quest2160.detail: Damn these guys, thinking they've got free rein of the place! Quit filming! You're bothering our customers!

aston_quest3010.title: Where is My Son?
aston_quest3010.detail: My son and I were walking in Shofukucho when we ran into a huge crowd and got separated. He's wearing green, do you see him?

aston_quest3020.title: Chicken Chase
aston_quest3020.detail: When I went into my garden this morning, I saw all my chickens had run away! They should be around this building, but I'm too worn out to search anymore. Please, someone catch them for me!

aston_quest3030.title: The Hidden One's Challenge
aston_quest3030.detail: It is I, the Hidden One! I challenge you to try and find me in Sotenbori. To make things fair, I'll give you a hint. I'm in a place where the far away can whisper in your ear. But hurry now, before they all disappear! Hehehe!

aston_quest3040.title: The Hidden One's Revenge
aston_quest3040.detail: This time it won't be so easy! Hmm, maybe in an alley will do, but what's that smell? Something crispy and of the sea... I'm suddenly craving, takoyaki!

aston_quest3050.title: The Hidden One's Last Stand
aston_quest3050.detail: Now I'm pullin' out all the stops, I can even hide inside the shops! So come here to wash your clothes all clean, but don't forget to visit the snack machine!

aston_quest3060.title: How 'Bout Them Kappas
aston_quest3060.detail: I got some advice on revitalizin' Sotenbori from a fella in Ijincho called Kodama. Then suddenly, I had a brilliant idea! Kappa searchin'! Think I could get ya to test it out for me?

aston_quest3070.title: Fukupi-chan Or Bust
aston_quest3070.detail: Ah, I really need that mask! I definitely had it before I crossed Bishamon Bridge, didn't I? If word gets out I lost it, it won't just be Fukupi-chan without a face!

aston_quest4010.title: In Need of a UFO Catcher
aston_quest4010.detail: Please, you gotta help me get a stuffed animal for my girlfriend! But I'm warning you, I know Nori-chan's cute, but you'd better not try any funny business, okay? Not that you'd have a chance, anyway. We're madly in love, and we never leave each other's side. Right, Nori-chan?

aston_quest4020.title: Can Anyone Conquer the UFO Catcher!?
aston_quest4020.detail: This dang game is impossible! I'm bein' played for a damn fool. Someone win a prize from this UFO catcher and avenge me!

aston_quest4110.title: Complete a 1-Shot Challenge on Easy!
aston_quest4110.detail: I'm trying to get better at pool, think you could give me some tips? I'm in love with one of my coworkers and I heard she's really into pool, so I'm gonna practice in secret and then really wow her! Pretty clever, huh?

aston_quest4120.title: Complete a 1-Shot Challenge on Normal!
aston_quest4120.detail: How was I supposed to know that my coworker's friend would also be a pool expert!? I just have to practice until I'm better than him. Could you show me something more advanced? Please!

aston_quest4210.title: A Friendly Game of Darts
aston_quest4210.detail: Up for some darts? I wanna find some pals to play with, and then after we can talk about our strategies n' give each other advice. Ain't that sound nice?

aston_quest5010.title: Never Forget Four Shine
aston_quest5010.detail: Back in the day, the cabaret club Four Shine was super popular, but how's it doin' now? That's what my friend and I were wonderin'. Could someone give us an update by takin' a picture of the place?

aston_quest5020.title: Osaka's Famous Clown
aston_quest5020.detail: I came to here to do some prep work for an Osaka-related event, but my schedule's so tight there's no way I'll get all the photography done without a bit of help. Sorry, but could I ask you to take a picture of the mechanical clown Kuidaore Taro for me?

aston_quest5030.title: Please Photograph Fukupi-chan
aston_quest5030.detail: So I've got a reputation for knowing a lot about the criminal underworld, but the truth is, I'm totally clueless. People have been asking me about this "Fukupi-chan" thing, so I need some kind of intel... Could I get you to show me a picture of it?

aston_quest5040.title: Calm My Nerves and Find My Car!
aston_quest5040.detail: That black car I just saw is the spitting image of mine... There's no way it actually is mine, right? Oh no, I'm getting nervous! Please, someone take a picture of my car to prove it's safe and sound... It should be in a parking lot in southwest Shofukucho!

aston_quest5050.title: Find the Flying Takoyaki!
aston_quest5050.detail: Urgent! Urgent! There's been a flying takoyaki sighting here in Osaka! As soon as humanly possible, obtain photographic evidence and bring it back to me! What? You want a hint? Hmm... I hear a witness reported seeing it around Shofukucho!

aston_quest5060.title: Find the Terrifying Beings!
aston_quest5060.detail: Emergency! Three incredibly strong beings have appeared in Osaka! As soon as possible, obtain photographic evidence and bring it to me! What? You want a hint? Hmm... I hear one of them breathes fire, one summons lightning, and one is poisonous!

aston_quest5070.title: Show Me Kids Playing "Pocket Circuit"
aston_quest5070.detail: A killer in Kamurocho!? It's even got a bar!? This "Pocket Circuit" thing sounds treacherous! Oh dear, I need someone—anyone—to show me a picture of what this place looks like!

aston_quest5080.title: Photograph the Boat Guy
aston_quest5080.detail: There's a sightseeing boat that rides along Sotenbori River, and I saw this wild-looking guy on board... but what if I was just hallucinating? For my own sanity, could someone take a picture of this guy?

aston_quest6010.title: Please Model for Me!
aston_quest6010.detail: A man wearing a Straw Hat, T-Shirt, and Straw Sandals? Who the hell's gonna be wearing that at this time of year? And that damn model I had booked flaked out on me! Shit, what am I supposed to do!?

aston_quest6020.title: The Outfit from My Memories
aston_quest6020.detail: Please, could you come here wearing Formal Attire, a Single Rose, and Leather Shoes? My husband was quite fond of that ensemble when he was still with us...

aston_quest6030.title: Turn That Frown Upside Down, Clown
aston_quest6030.detail: Work keeps me so busy, I don't know my son's preferences... Is it true that only a clown can stop his tears? Maybe Clown Makeup would be enough... Oh, please be enough...

aston_quest6040.title: A Taste of Kabuki
aston_quest6040.detail: I came to Japan to see kabuki, but failed to get tickets... The next available show won't be until after I fly home. Please, if I could only see someone in Kabuki Makeup, I'd be happy...

aston_quest6050.title: Bring a Smile to My Soulless Face
aston_quest6050.detail: Please, can someone help bring back my smile? Heh... Those halcyon days where I laughed at a man in a Bodysuit and Weird Stranger Makeup on TV feel so long ago...

aston_quest6060.title: My Friend Needs to Understand
aston_quest6060.detail: That guy I saw wearing a Shirtless Blazer and Snake Eyepatch was just the coolest! But when I mentioned it to my friend, she didn't agree at all. I want to prove to her how cool he was! Could you model that outfit for us?

aston_quest7010.title: Have Mercy, Give Food!
aston_quest7010.detail: Man, I'm hungry... Don't s'pose ya have anythin' to eat? I already stopped by the soup kitchen yesterday, but gave it out to all the stray cats 'round here...

aston_quest7020.title: Today's a Boozin' Day
aston_quest7020.detail: The local baseball team clinched their championship today! Makes ya wanna party hard! Congratulations to 'em! And while they're at the top of the world, I've fallen this low... *sniff*... Yeah, really makes ya wanna drink...

aston_quest7030.title: Somethin' for the Pain
aston_quest7030.detail: I can't tell nobody what happened! Can't believe I slipped an' hurt myself 'cause I was too busy gawkin' at a pretty lady's assets... Maybe an energy drink would keep me goin' before it gets out...

aston_quest7040.title: I Want a Convenience Store Bento!
aston_quest7040.detail: I heard normal people don't think much of convenience store bentos, but to me one o' those is a right feast! So much stuff packed in there, all crispy an' fresh... My mouth's waterin' just thinkin' about it.

aston_quest7050.title: If Only I Had an Energy Drink...
aston_quest7050.detail: I know it's pathetic, but I just can't deal with bugs an' other creepy crawlies. Last night I saw a fly an' got so freaked out I sprained my ankle... I gotta heal up with an energy drink before I become the laughin' stock of the town.

aston_quest7060.title: A Certain Taiyaki Brand
aston_quest7060.detail: A while back, a lil birdy told me 'bout some insanely good taiyaki. What was it called... Started with an S, I think? SONIC Taiyaki...?

aston_quest8010.title: Solve the Mysterious Note
aston_quest8010.detail: "Four turtles form the pillars of this city. Beyond their gazes, a glittering orb resides." Hey, can someone decode this message for me? Of course, whoever finds the treasure can keep it. It's just that it's bothering me so much I can't concentrate on anything else...

aston_quest5090.title: Find the Cute Café!
aston_quest5090.detail: Here it is, your final directive! In the southern part of Shofukucho, there's a charming café with outdoor seating. I want you to find it, and snap a photo for me! Your hint? The tables and chairs are white. Got it?

aston_quest7070.title: Desperate for Takoyaki
aston_quest7070.detail: I'm gonna die if I don't get takoyaki in my belly... If I survive, I wanna go home and get married...

aston_quest7080.title: Real-Deal Okonomiyaki
aston_quest7080.detail: What the hell is "Kansai-style" okonomiyaki, anyway!? Kansai invented okonomiyaki! And the stuff in Sotenbori's the best in the whole damn region!

aston_quest7090.title: An Egg-cellent Idea
aston_quest7090.detail: I hear the price of eggs has been skyrocketin' lately. If I can incubate one, I'll get me a chicken who'll give me even more eggs... Ehehe, I'm gonna make millions!

aston_quest7110.title: The Luxury Yakiniku Bento Dream
aston_quest7110.detail: After catchin' a whiff of that one at the park, I just can't get it outta my head! I gotta have a Luxury Yakiniku Bento, if it's the last thing I do...

aston_quest7120.title: Hungry For Sushi
aston_quest7120.detail: I could really go for some sushi. I don't even care what kind it is, just please—I need it!

aston_quest7130.title: Up For an Azuki Bar
aston_quest7130.detail: Ah, dang it... My blood sugar level's droppin' and I'm gettin' a lil woozy. Times like these, somethin' sweet always helps. I'm thinkin' a Hokkaido Azuki Bar would do the trick...

aston_quest7140.title: That Tantalizing Tauriner!
aston_quest7140.detail: I've got a mock interview with Hello Work today, but my nerves are tearin' me apart... Maybe a Tauriner would help me out.

aston_quest7150.title: Order of Oden
aston_quest7150.detail: Dang, it's chilly. Why's it so cold out these days? Makes me wanna eat somethin' nice and hot.

aston_quest7160.title: Pinin' For Pine Candy
aston_quest7160.detail: I quit smokin' recently for health reasons, but it feels weird not havin' anythin' to chew on. If I had some sorta candy, that'd help. Like Pine Candy, for example.

aston_quest9010.title: Challenge to the Informant #1
aston_quest9010.detail: Think you can ace a quiz conjured up by me, the Sotenbori expert? If ya get my question right, I'll have a nice reward for ya.

aston_quest9020.title: Challenge to the Informant #2
aston_quest9020.detail: Here's my second quiz question. You'll be able to get it if you've been payin' attention 'round Sotenbori. I'll give ya somethin' good if ya get it right.

aston_quest9030.title: Challenge to the Informant #3
aston_quest9030.detail: Here's my third quiz question. How 'bout it? Been lookin' carefully at yer surroundings as ya walk around Sotenbori? Of course, there's somethin' good in it for ya as a reward.

aston_quest9040.title: Challenge to the Informant #4
aston_quest9040.detail: Here's my fourth quiz question. From now on, yer not gonna get these just by roamin' around. But yer reward's gonna get even better.

aston_quest9050.title: Challenge to the Informant #5
aston_quest9050.detail: Here's my fifth quiz question. Yer doin' pretty good on my quiz so far. Learned a lot about Sotenbori?

aston_quest9060.title: Challenge to the Informant #6
aston_quest9060.detail: This is it—my final quiz question. If yer plannin' to deal in information about Sotenbori, then ya gotta be well-versed in the nightlife.

aston_quest4310.title: Four Golf Bingos!
aston_quest4310.detail: I just wanna see someone get four bingos in bingolf! I know what yer thinkin': why not do it yerself? Thing is, I love it but I'm damn terrible. I just gotta see it once!

aston_quest4320.title: Eight Golf Bingos!
aston_quest4320.detail: I just gotta see someone get eight bingos in bingolf! What? I said I'd be satisfied with just four? Gwahaha! I got greedy! This'll be the last one, I promise!

aston_quest4410.title: Score a 90 on "Baka Mitai"!
aston_quest4410.detail: To me, music is life. Which means the points ya score in karaoke are a measure of yer worth. So, think you could get at least 90 points singin' "Baka Mitai"?

aston_quest4420.title: Score a 90 on "Hands"!
aston_quest4420.detail: As music goes, so does the world... This one's more of a personal request. When I held my tiny little nephew's hand, a thought suddenly crossed my mind: I really wanna hear "Hands"! Think you can get a 90 again?

aston_quest4430.title: Score a 90 on "Like a Butterfly"!
aston_quest4430.detail: I wanna hear somethin' that makes me feel things... A song both heart-wrenchin' and powerful! That's why I'm askin' ya to get 90 points on "Like a Butterfly"! But the song's a duet, so you'll need to find someone else to sing with ya.

aston_quest4440.title: Sing Me "Sayonara, Silent Night"
aston_quest4440.detail: Whenever I listen to songs from my youth, I feel like I been transported back in time. I'd like ya to help me make some new memories by singin' the new song, "Sayonara, Silent Night"!

aston_quest4450.title: Let's Hear "Shin Ichizu Samurai"!
aston_quest4450.detail: The new song's "Shin Ichizu Samurai," so of course I wanna hear it. Whew, karaoke really is great, ain't it? Nothin' like the power of song bringin' everyone together... Ah, sorry, got a little sappy there. Now, let's hear that voice soar!

aston_quest4510.title: [HELP WANTED] Pocket Circuit Rival Needed (Masaru)
aston_quest4510.detail: No one, kid or adult, is better than me! If anyone thinks otherwise, then come and challenge me to a race. I'd love to see you try!

aston_quest4520.title: [HELP WANTED] Pocket Circuit Rival Needed (Kensuke)
aston_quest4520.detail: Finally, my Pocket Circuit stuff came! My first race against my classmates is still a ways off, but I just couldn't wait! Before I knew it, I'd put together my car already and now it's starin' at me n' ready to go!

aston_quest4530.title: [HELP WANTED] Pocket Circuit Rival Needed (Kazuko)
aston_quest4530.detail: Hehe... Are there really old guys out there playing Pocket Circuit? 'Cause if there are, I'm looking for one to race!

aston_quest4540.title: [HELP WANTED] Pocket Circuit Rival Needed (Yuko)
aston_quest4540.detail: Those boys in class have been no fun lately, and then I learned they all been gatherin' to play Pocket Circuit in secret! I need a practice partner so I can crush 'em to bits!

aston_quest4550.title: [HELP WANTED] Pocket Circuit Rival Needed (Masashi)
aston_quest4550.detail: I always dreamed of dumping money into Pocket Circuit when I was a kid, and now I can! Might be a little tight on my wallet, but this feeling of nostalgia is priceless! I'm looking for someone I can race against and enjoy the feeling of being a kid again!

aston_quest4560.title: [HELP WANTED] Pocket Circuit Rival Needed (Tomoya)
aston_quest4560.detail: I convinced my girlfriend to try Pocket Circuit, and now she's even better than I am! Which means that I have a talent for finding talent, so I'm currently looking for a race partner! Let me evaluate your Pocket Circuit prospects!

aston_quest4570.title: [HELP WANTED] Pocket Circuit Rival Needed (Kanami)
aston_quest4570.detail: So this is the kind of thing boys like to do? That's it, I need a race partner so I can see what all the fuss is about.

aston_quest4580.title: [HELP WANTED] Pocket Circuit Rival Needed (Keiko)
aston_quest4580.detail: My boyfriend taught me how to play Pocket Circuit and now I'm better than him! Since then I been winnin' every match I play. Does that mean I might be a Pocket Circuit genius? Well, anyone who wants to challenge a genius, step right up!

aston_quest4590.title: [HELP WANTED] Pocket Circuit Rival Needed (Shiori)
aston_quest4590.detail:
Seeking a rival to race in Pocket Circuit. Bonus points if a good conversation partner.
About Me: I've got the ultimate pairing. Talkin' about my custom car of course!
OK if not mutuals.

aston_quest4600.title: [HELP WANTED] Pocket Circuit Rival Needed (Toru)
aston_quest4600.detail: Did ya really beat my daughter, Kazuko? How 'bout we settle this ourselves. I'll show ya what a real racer looks like!

aston_quest4610.title: [HELP WANTED] Pocket Circuit Rival Needed (Yusuke)
aston_quest4610.detail: Before I knew it, I'd gotten older than the hero I always looked up to. But I still remember those days like it was yesterday. So when I saw some Pocket Circuit cars in the toy section I just had to get them. It'd be really nice if I could find someone like my old partner to race against...

aston_quest4620.title: [HELP WANTED] Pocket Circuit Rival Needed (Momozo)
aston_quest4620.detail: Ho ho ho, I heard from Toru that there's a certain fellow who defeated both my son and granddaughter. I'd like to see what kinda racer this man is for myself!

aston_quest4630.title: [HELP WANTED] Pocket Circuit Rival Needed (Katsuyuki)
aston_quest4630.detail: If you do all the calculations correctly, it's easy to tell how something will move. If only people's hearts could so easily be read, then right now, she and I would be... No, end train of thought. All I have is Pocket Circuit now. I'm ready to race.

aston_quest4640.title: [HELP WANTED] Pocket Circuit Rival Needed (Ami)
aston_quest4640.detail: Is there anyone out there who can beat me? My win streak's got no end in sight, and I need a challenge! But if you're too scared, that's just fine too. Big sis can teach you all kinds of things!

aston_quest4650.title: [HELP WANTED] Pocket Circuit Rival Needed (Saburo)
aston_quest4650.detail: Finally, the day has come. My wife cast her wrathful gaze on my collection of Pocket Circuit cars and demanded I say goodbye. So this is my final race, to form a final memory before I leave it all behind... I just need to find an opponent first.

aston_quest4660.title: [HELP WANTED] Pocket Circuit Rival Needed (Gou-ou)
aston_quest4660.detail: I thought I'd try out one of the hobbies I missed out on in my youth, but I don't have anyone to race against. Perhaps this is the cost of being solely focused on money... Is there no one out there who might fill this emptiness for me?
